title: synthesis-task work-unit-kind stub
description: Stub spec for the synthesis-task identifier registered into work-unit.kind per D29 + D53 §B. Real synthesis-task payload schema (query/sources/draft fields) is Phase C+ territory; this stub demonstrates the vocabulary-registration spec-ref resolution path per D2 strict protocol-neutrality and D38 (knowledge composes via existing primitives — work-unit-kind is one of those primitives).
